articles.title: Nova Folding Scheme Achieves New Performance Benchmarks
articles.description: Microsoft Research announces improvements to Nova folding-based ZKP system, reducing prover time by 3x for institutional settlement workloads.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation Funds ZK Research Grants
articles.description: New round of grants targeting zero-knowledge proof scalability and privacy applications in regulated finance.

articles.title: DTCC Completes Phase 2 of Digital Securities Pilot on Azure
articles.description: DTCC clearing tokenized Treasury securities with privacy-preserving verification using Project Nova.

articles.title: JPMorgan Expands Tokenized Deposit Network to 5 Countries
articles.description: Major expansion of Onyx platform for cross-border wholesale payments using tokenized deposits.

articles.title: EU MiCA Implementation Drives Stablecoin Compliance Wave
articles.description: Financial institutions accelerate compliance programs as MiCA enforcement begins across EU.

articles.title: Maersk Scales Blockchain Supply Chain Tracking to 12 Ports
articles.description: Shipping giant expands DLT tracking for real-time cargo provenance and customs clearance.

articles.title: NHS Pilots Blockchain for Patient Record Consent
articles.description: UK health service tests privacy-preserving consent verification for cross-hospital data sharing.

articles.title: Succinct Labs Raises Series B for ZK Prover Network
articles.description: SP1 Hypercube prover network startup secures funding to expand enterprise proof marketplace.

articles.title: Fireblocks Launches Institutional DeFi Access Layer
articles.description: Custody platform enables banks to access DeFi protocols through permissioned compliance wrappers.

articles.title: Azure Expands Confidential Computing for Digital Assets
articles.description: Microsoft expands SGX/SNP enclave availability to 12 new regions for blockchain and ZKP workloads.

articles.title: AWS Adds Managed Blockchain Node Runner Support
articles.description: Amazon expands managed node infrastructure for Ethereum, Polygon, and Avalanche validators.
